title: Spotted Dick Pudding
description: A traditional British steamed pudding flavored with suet and spices, often served with custard.
instructions: Grease a 1-pint pudding basin with butter.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the Spotted Dick mix, sugar, eggs, and milk.
Add the melted butter and mix until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to the prepared pudding basin.
Cover the pudding with a piece of parchment paper or aluminum foil.
Place the pudding in a large pot or steamer basket.
Add enough boiling water to come halfway up the side of the pudding basin.
Steam the pudding for 2-3 hours, or until cooked through.
Remove the pudding from the heat and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Serve the pudding with custard or whipped cream.
